name: Coverage Baseline + E2E Long Book Verification

summary.overall: Sprint A-P1 successfully completed. All P0 deliverables ready. Coverage baseline established. E2E long book verification script ready.
blockers_resolved: Langfuse v3/v4 API compatibility fixed (removed deprecated .trace() method, replaced with start_as_current_observation and @observe)

A-P1-1_Long_Novel_Test_Data.description: Full text of 红楼梦 for E2E testing

A-P1-2_E2E_Verification_Script.description: Full pipeline verification on long novel in mock mode, generates detailed metrics report

A-P1-3_Coverage_Baseline_Script.description: Generates coverage baseline JSON with category targets (pipeline ≥75%, schemas ≥95%, etc.)

langfuse_fix.issue: Langfuse v4 removed .trace() method from client
langfuse_fix.solution: Rewrote langfuse_client.py using v4 APIs: start_as_current_observation() and @observe decorator

known_issues.test_performance: Slow test execution (~4-5s per test) due to LiteLLM model cost map fetch at import time (network DNS issues). Environment variable LITELLM_LOCAL_MODEL_COST_MAP set but not fully effective.
known_issues.low_coverage_modules: extract.py (17%), synthesize.py (21%), quality_check.py (32%) - need more test coverage for non-mock paths

next_steps: Fix LiteLLM import performance (use LITELLM_LOCAL_MODEL_COST_MAP=true somewhere earlier)
Add non-mock path tests for extract.py, synthesize.py, quality_check.py to boost coverage to ≥85%
Run full test suite with coverage after performance fix
